on_start.default: We are starting to do forearm exercises. We will practice in sitting. Sit on the chair.

on_end.default: End of exercise, let's get ready for the next exercise.

on_warning.In_Base_pos_right: Do forearm and lift your right leg.
on_warning.In_Base_pos_left: Do forearm and lift your left leg.

Predpazene_ruky_vysoko_a_odseba.leg_wrong: Then move your hands down to a horizontal position and closer to each other.
Predpazene_ruky_vysoko_a_odseba.leg_right: Move your hands down to a horizontal position and closer to each other.

Predpazene_ruky_vysoko_a_nespravne.leg_wrong: Then move your hands down to a horizontal position and into the correct position.
Predpazene_ruky_vysoko_a_nespravne.leg_right: Move your hands down to a horizontal position.

Predpazene_ruky_vysoko.leg_wrong: At the same time, move your hands down to a horizontal position.
Predpazene_ruky_vysoko.leg_right: Try to move your hands down to a horizontal position.

Predpazene_ruky_nizko_a_odseba.leg_wrong: At the same time, try to move your clasped hands up to a horizontal position and bring them closer together.
Predpazene_ruky_nizko_a_odseba.leg_right: Try to move your clasped hands up to a horizontal position and bring them closer together

Predpazene_ruky_nizko_a_nespravne.leg_wrong: Again, move your clasped hands up to a horizontal position.
Predpazene_ruky_nizko_a_nespravne.leg_right: Again, move your clasped hands up to a horizontal position.

Predpazene_ruky_nizko.leg_wrong: At the same time, move your clasped hands up to a horizontal position.
Predpazene_ruky_nizko.leg_right: Try to move your clasped hands up to a horizontal position.

Predpazene_ruky_priliz_od_seba.leg_wrong: Again bring your forearmed hands closer together
Predpazene_ruky_priliz_od_seba.leg_right: Bring your hands a little closer together.

Predpazene_ruky_zle.leg_wrong: Also, bring your forearm to a horizontal position.

Prava_ruka_vysoko_a_od_tela.leg_wrong: Then place your right hand a little lower and closer to your left hand.
Prava_ruka_vysoko_a_od_tela.leg_right: Place your right hand a little lower and closer to your left hand.

Prava_ruka_vysoko.leg_wrong: Then try to put your right hand a little lower.
Prava_ruka_vysoko.leg_right: Try to put your right hand a little lower.

Prava_ruka_nizko_a_od_tela.leg_wrong: Potom pravú ruku zdvihňi trochu vyššie a bližšie k ľavej ruke.
Prava_ruka_nizko_a_od_tela.leg_right: Pravú ruku zdvihňi trochu vyššie a bližšie k ľavej ruke.

Prava_ruka_nizko.leg_wrong: Zároveň daj pravú ruku trošku vyššie.

Prava_ruka_od_tela.leg_wrong: Zároveň pravú ruku priblíž viac k ľavej ruke.
Prava_ruka_od_tela.leg_right: Pravú ruku priblíž viac k ľavej ruke.

Lava_ruka_vysoko_a_od_tela.leg_wrong: Then place your left hand a little lower and closer to your right hand.
Lava_ruka_vysoko_a_od_tela.leg_right: Place your left hand a little lower and closer to your right hand.

Lava_ruka_vysoko.leg_wrong: Then try to put your left hand a little lower.
Lava_ruka_vysoko.leg_right: Try putting your left hand a little lower.

Lava_ruka_nizko_a_od_tela.leg_wrong: Then raise your left hand a little higher and closer to your right hand.
Lava_ruka_nizko_a_od_tela.leg_right: Raise your left hand a little higher and closer to your right hand.

Lava_ruka_nizko.leg_wrong: At the same time, raise your left hand a little higher.
Lava_ruka_nizko.leg_right: Raise your left hand a little higher.

Lava_ruka_od_tela.leg_wrong: At the same time, bring your left hand closer to your right hand.
Lava_ruka_od_tela.leg_right: Bring your left hand closer to your right hand.

on_warning.default: Try to do better forearm raises.
on_warning.error: Also try to do better forearm raises. Make sure your arms are horizontal to your shoulders.
